mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: cleft palate, thoracic kyphoscoliosis, ocular pain
sprengel anomaly, increased body weight, lumbar kyphosis, arthrogryposis multiplex congenita, distal arthrogryposis
shuffling gait, hematochezia, prominent interphalangeal joints
restless behavior, microcephaly (implied by multiple joint contractures), growth retardation (implied by decreased body weight)
chest wall abnormalities (implicated by thoracic and lumbar kyphoscoliosis), short stature (implied by decreased body weight)
dislocations (implied by hip hernia and knee pain), joint laxity (implied by multiple joint contractures)
bone lesions (implied by sclerotic scapulas and bony changes from kyphoscoliosis), progressive stiffness (restlessness could be related to muscle rigidity or anxiety as secondary symptoms)
tremors (possible cause of restlessness), skeletal manifestations (spine curvature, leg problems)
skull base defects (cleft palate), long bones involvement (shorter stature, bowed legs)
